event: twelve core prostatic tissue samples collected
observed for 24 hours until no fever evident
backache persisted after 3 days of treatment
plain radiography of lumbar spine performed
cystic lesion 3.3 cm over right psoas muscle
cystic lesion could not be drained percutaneously
scheduled for MRI of lumbar spine
MRI revealed abscesses in L3/4 and L4/5 disc spaces
MRI revealed narrow enhancement of L3-L5 vertebral bodies
MRI revealed abnormally enhanced lesions in psoas muscles
ceftriaxone switched to doripenem 0.25 g three times daily
total laminectomies of L4/L5 vertebrae performed
pathology revealed chronic inflammation of spine
pathology revealed chronic inflammation of epidural tissue
patient discharged on seventh postoperative day
